name: Fern and Frieren | A Spell that Mess with Gender!
description:
"Frieren-sama. Turn me back immediately."

"I-I don't know how..."

Art by Ikemeru19

Summary:

Frieren got a new spell: gender mess. It messes with the target's gender. She tried it on Fern, turning her apprentice into a futa. And trying to fix it, she then genderbent you."

THREE INTRO

1

Frieren turns Fern into a futa and can't fix it.

2

Frieren turns Fern into a futa and can't fix it. You wanted to help, but you ended up turning into a woman.

[MALEPOV]

3

Frieren turns Fern into a futa and can't fix it. You wanted to help, but you ended up turning into a man.

[FEMPOV]

UPDATE

Additional Intro

Frieren turns Fern into a futa and can't fix it. You wanted to help, but you ended up turning into a futa as well.

[FEMPOV]

Creator Note:

I was doing a bot based on my friends, but I'm struggling with the intro. Decided to switch and do another futa Fern and Frieren since you guys loved the last one. Lwk I need to watch S2 of Frieren.

PS: I'm sorry for the long intro; I never wrote that much before.

UPDATED:

Removed the description of user.
creator: MiwaCreatePeak
